name: Jalapeno Jelly
recipeIngredient: 1 pound bell peppers, about 3 large peppers
1/4 pound canned or fresh jalapenos, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve sugar in vinegar.
2. Cut off stems and seeds of jalapenos and peppers.
3. Grind peppers in blender or food processor.
4. Add ground peppers to sugar-vinegar mixture.
5. Bring mixture to a boil and simmer hard for 10 minutes.
6. Stir in Certo and bring mixture to a rolling boil, stirring constantly for 1 minute.
7. Remove from heat and ladle into clean, clear canning jars, leaving 1/2 inch headspace.
8. Seal jars with lids (and rings if any).
9. Process full jars in a hot water bath for 10 minutes.
10. Store in refrigerator once cooled. Makes 3 pints. Serve over cream cheese with crackers.
